name: C-18 single-control mode reports no-fetch-record when no marker file exists for the framework
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --framework never-fetched --control-id CC1.1 --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit-status s.json; grep -q 'no-fetch-record' s.json && echo never 1>&2
